zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire於1075年出生在法國時，他的父親Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI30歲，母親Emma Capet21歲。他於1098年與Berthilde De Bavay - De Hirson在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德巴瓦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1150年2月23日享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire于1075年出生在法国时，他的父亲Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI30岁，母亲Emma Capet21岁。他于1098年与Berthilde De Bavay - De Hirson在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德巴瓦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1150年2月23日享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bampton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from one or more of the places so called, such as Bampton (Oxon, Devon, Westm), Kirkbampton (Cumb), and Bempton (ER Yorks).

variants.name: Banton
meanings: English (West Midlands): variant of Bampton, a habitational name from one or more of the places so called.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire was born in 1075, in France, his father, Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI, was 30 and his mother, Emma Capet, was 21. He married Berthilde De Bavay - De Hirson in 1098, in Bavay, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 23 February 1150, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire est né en 1075, à France, son père, Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Emma Capet, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Berthilde De Bavay - De Hirson en 1098, à Bavay, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 février 1150, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire 1075 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI 30 und seine Mutter Emma Capet 21. Er hat 1098 in Bavay, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Berthilde De Bavay - De Hirson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. Februar 1150 im Alter von 75 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire è nato il nel 1075 nel Francia, il suo padre, Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Emma Capet, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Berthilde De Bavay - De Hirson nel 1098, nel Bavay, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 febbraio 1150, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshireが1075年にフランスで生まれた時，父Gauthier Ier DE DOUAIは30歳，母Emma Capetは21歳であった。1098年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードバヴァイでBerthilde De Bavay - De Hirsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1150年2月23日に75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire(이)가 1075년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma Capet(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1098년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 바베이에서 Berthilde De Bavay - De Hirson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1150년 2월 23일 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire nasceu em 1075, em França, seu pai, Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Emma Capet, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Berthilde De Bavay - De Hirson em 1098, em Bavay, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 23 de fevereiro de 1150, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire родился в 1075 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Capet, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Berthilde De Bavay - De Hirson в 1098 г. в местности бавеи, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 23 февраля 1150 г. в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Bampton Lord of Bampton, Devonshire nació en 1075, en Francia, su papá, Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Emma Capet, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Berthilde De Bavay - De Hirson en 1098, en Bavay, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de febrero de 1150, a la edad de 75 años.
